'''vachïfgïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nybble|nybble]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nybble|nybble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| vachïfgïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || væchïfgïfth || væchïfgïfj || væchïfgïfsh || væchïfgïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vachïfchïfgïfth || vachïfchïfgïfj || vachïfchïfgïfsh || vachïfchïfgïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vachïfgïfth || vachïfgïfj || vachïfgïfsh || vachïfgïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vachïffgïffth || vachïffgïffj || vachïffgïffsh || vachïffgïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vachïfgïfïf || vachïfgïfïf || vachïfgïfïf || vachïfgïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || vachïfgïfth || vachïfgïfj || vachïfgïfsh || vachïfgïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vachïfgïfïfl || vachïfgïfïfl || vachïfgïfïfl || vachïfgïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vachïfgïfïfïf || vachïfgïfïfïf || vachïfgïfïfïf || vachïfgïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || vachïfgïfïfn || vachïfgïfïfn || vachïfgïfïfn || vachïfgïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vachïfgïfïforo || vachïfgïfïforo || vachïfgïfïforo || vachïfgïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
